utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check if each is fully specified per the required details: 1) destination: fully specified (Prague, Czech Republic). 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided (July 1st - 5th, 2024) though 5 days vs 4 nights ambiguity, but dates are specified. 3) transportation: should be flight details with costs; provided only as 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class for 4 people, estimated €200 total' with no flight numbers, departure/arrival cities/times—cost included but flight details are too vague; not fully specified. 4) accommodation: should be hotel selection with costs; provided as 'Backpacker's Base (one-star hostel...), 5 nights, estimated €325 total' which gives name/type, nights, and cost—sufficient as a selection with costs. 5) activities: selected activities with costs; itemized with amounts and total—sufficient. 6) additional_services: provided as 'None'—acceptable. 7) total_budget: '€1535'—complete cost figure present, but no breakdown beyond line items; however the line items above list costs, so considered acceptable. Therefore, items fully specified: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget = 6. Transportation is not fully specified per 'flight details with costs'.
